attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who targets stage wins from long-range moves, capable of finishing with sprint strength when surviving to the line in reduced groups.
team_tactics: Astana willing to use him as expendable domestique for GC ambitions, deployed for sustained tempo work until exhaustion. Given freedom to hunt stages when team GC not in play.
terrain_preference: Breakaway-friendly stages where reduced bunch sprints favor strong finishers. Can handle sustained climbing efforts but not final selection-making gradients.
vulnerability: Sacrificed without hesitation when team GC needs demand it. Gets dropped after extended pacing duties, suggesting limited recovery capacity for multi-day sacrifice.
key_patterns: Functions as expendable domestique for Astana GC goals, worked to exhaustion (2 instances)
Seeks breakaway stage wins at Grand Tours when given freedom (2 observations)
Shows sprint capacity in reduced groups, can contest wins from breaks (1 direct observation)
Stage win hungry but winless at Grand Tour level through 2019 (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: 2019 Giro showed improved stage-hunting aggression and competitiveness compared to pure domestique role in 2018
